# Header

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** panels  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `Header`

Shared header row for {@link ContentPanel} chrome.

_Source: `src/components/panels/Header.js`_

## Import

```js
import { Header } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### Header

```js
return new Header({
    title: "Inspector",
    icon: "info",
    actions: [new Button("…").addClass("secondary")],
  });
```
